    "Remove conductors from bus gutter space",
    "Reroute conductors through proper wiring gutters or terminal areas per panel manufacturer instructions",

    "Re-torque terminations after rerouting"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Art. 408 and manufacturer panelboard instructions require bus gutters to remain clear for wiring space, heat dissipation, and safe servicing. Conductors crossing the bus gutter violate working space and proper panel wiring practice, making the installation non-compliant even though the work is in progress. This is a correctable field defect, not an catastrophic hazard, so risk is medium.",

    "NEC Art. 408",

    "NEC 200.4"
